nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaz which he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Ahaz that he did, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Judah?

cnv.text: 亞哈斯所行其餘的事蹟，不是都寫在猶大列王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 亚哈斯其他的事都记在犹大的列王史上。
